title: 大阪杯の後に・我等が示すは

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(You're not there yet, Yaeno! I know this isn't the
full extent of your ability!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That goes without saying!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crrrrack!

text_block_list.name: Ardan and Yaeno
text_block_list.text: I will surpass my limits, right here, right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: That race was amazing! Did you see Yaeno Muteki and Mejiro Ardan?! They were out of this world!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: That was so exciting! I got goosebumps all over!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That was amazing! Both Ardan and Yaeno are
truly incredible!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
During the race, I could feel them helping each
other to surpass their limits! And not just once,
but over and over!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Their endless radiance... It felt like it could shine
through anything... I just couldn't take my eyes
off them!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If only I could've been there... running alongside
the two of them!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I think that ought to have done it. I expect we
got through to Chiyono O there.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (As such...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: We'll be waiting for you. Right here...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Is it just me or is Mejiro Ardan holding out
her hand?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you're right. I wonder if that's some kind of
signal...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...No matter what, I will return to that stage.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll overcome all of my limits! I'm going to go so
far past them! Then I'll catch up to you all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: So until then... wait for me!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...It appears you got through to her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes. And for that, you have my thanks.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So then... the next time we do battle, let's do so
as a trio.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: The Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...That is where I will await you and Chiyono O.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The Grand Prix... It will make a fitting stage for
our gathering.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Needless to say, the win will be mine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I've no intention of simply handing over the
trophy either.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Yaeno... Chiyono O and I are lucky to have you
as our rival.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...As such, I would like to set the Takarazuka
Kinen as our next goal. But what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen was just the goal I was
hoping for after seeing today's results. I think
she's got a good shot at winning it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. I knew I could count on you
to say that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Chiyono O is surely going to return to racing,
isn't she?
choice_data_list: If you believe she will, then I bet she will.
If you believe she will, then I bet she will.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...In that case, I expect that the Takarazuka Kinen
will prove to be quite a fantastic race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trusting wholeheartedly in Chiyono O, Mejiro
Ardan sets her sights firmly on the Takarazuka
Kinen.
